meta.title: RabbitMatch — Match & tournament platform for racket sports
meta.description: Organize matches and tournaments for padel, tennis, table tennis, badminton and squash. CRM for sports clubs.

hero.title: Sports without the chaos
hero.subtitle: RabbitMatch is the unified platform for racket sports: tournament and match organization, an international-grade rating system, deep analytics, easy booking and a CRM for clubs.

solution.lead: Legacy CRMs are outdated. We're building an ecosystem for businesses and players.
solution.aiHighlight: AI that helps you earn money

items.01body: iOS, Android, Web and Telegram Mini App. A live stream of players and bookings flows directly to your courts. Run tournaments and collect player analytics.
items.02title: A single database of all players
items.02body: Browsing history, preferences, contacts. Personalized offers for every client.
items.03body: Use artificial intelligence to analyze financial KPIs and recommendations, monitor court utilization, revenue and player communication — all in one place.

players.title: The players find you themselves
players.tournamentsBody: An interface for organizing and managing tournaments with 5+ formats and 20+ individual settings. A pro rating system that simplifies finding the right players for every game. A growing player base, ratings and profiles — your club inside a live venue.
players.tournamentsHighlight: On average +30% in customers for bookings
players.bookingBody: Pick the date, time and court in two clicks — no phone calls or messengers. Direct integration with the CRM for club owners.
players.controlBody: Manage prices, subscriptions, schedules, promotions and news for your customers — from one place.
players.controlHighlight: Your schedule is always at hand

phoneAlt.courts: Courts feed in the RabbitMatch app
phoneAlt.matchMap: Pick a club on the map

contactModal.title: Connect your club
contactModal.subtitle: Tell us a bit about you and we'll get back within one business day.
contactModal.name: Name
contactModal.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to discuss?
contactModal.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within one business day.
contactModal.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

launch.title: Launch in 3 steps
launch.intro1Body: English and Russian. The interface, notifications and reports are clear to your customers and staff. Round-the-clock support in Russian and English from our team.
launch.intro2Body: We set up RabbitMatch CRM for your club: courts, schedule, prices and promotions. A personal manager runs onboarding for your team.
launch.step2Body: Move contacts, booking history and subscriptions from Excel or any other system.
launch.step3Body: Online training for administrators and coaches. 24/7 support in Russian and English.
launch.runnerAlt: Stylized lime line drawing of a runner climbing steps

rows.telegram: Quick access from Telegram and Web

values.errorsLoss: Errors, loss of data and control
values.rabbitPrice: FREE for the first 2 months, then from $39 / month
